description_long: This is a stand-up resealable pouch made of matte tan plastic, containing a food product labeled as 'marimar' sea salt. The front of the package features blue and white text, with a palm tree graphic and the words 'SAL DE MAR' and 'EXTRAIDA ARTESANALMENTE EN COLIMA' prominently displayed. The bottom front indicates a net weight of 590g and highlights the product's mineral content. The back of the pouch is densely printed with product information, including a description, nutritional facts, and a barcode. The sides of the pouch are gusseted, allowing the bag to expand and stand upright when filled. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on natural and artisanal qualities.
description: A tan, resealable stand-up pouch labeled 'marimar' sea salt, featuring blue and white text, palm tree graphics, and detailed product information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'marimar' branding, palm tree graphic, and product details in blue and white text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the gusseted edge and the slim profile of the pouch, with minimal visible text.
description_view_2: Back view revealing extensive product information, including a description, nutritional facts, and a barcode.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other gusseted edge and a continuation of the pouch's tan color.
attribute_brand_logo: The front of the pouch displays the 'marimar' brand name in large blue letters, with a palm tree graphic above it. The logo is centrally located and uses blue and white as dominant colors.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front text indicates 'SAL DE MAR' (sea salt) and 'MÁS MINERALES', suggesting a mineral-rich sea salt product. No other flavor is indicated.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutritional facts panel is visible on the lower back of the pouch, listing ingredients and nutritional information.
